message:
fix(net): WebSocket From→TryFrom, entropy injection, PathState repr(u8)

WebSocket client:
- Frame→Message conversion changed from From to TryFrom<Frame>:
  Text frames now validate UTF-8 strictly (from_utf8 instead of
  from_utf8_lossy), returning WsError::InvalidUtf8 on failure.
  This prevents silently mangled text messages from propagating.
- connect() now passes cx.entropy() to ClientHandshake::new()
  for deterministic handshake key generation in lab tests

WebSocket frame:
- generate_mask_key() calls check_ambient_entropy("websocket_mask")
  before getrandom, enabling detection of unintended ambient entropy
  usage in deterministic test environments

WebSocket handshake:
- generate_client_key() accepts &dyn EntropySource parameter instead
  of calling getrandom directly, enabling deterministic testing
- ClientHandshake::new() takes entropy source parameter
- Tests updated to use DetEntropy for reproducible handshake keys

Transport aggregator:
- PathState gains #[repr(u8)] with explicit discriminants (0-3)
  for safe atomic storage via AtomicU8
- Import AtomicU8 for lock-free path state transitions

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
